name: CrossFlowCorrelationEngine

neutralConcepts: Cross-flow joins MUST include tenantId in every predicate — no cross-tenant correlation (CF-FLOW13-AN-1)
sourceFlows must list all flows contributing data, minimum 2 sources
All cross-flow reads are read-only — never mutate source flow data

ironRules.rule: Cross-flow joins MUST include tenantId in every predicate — no cross-tenant data correlation. CF-FLOW13-AN-1.
sourceFlows must list ALL contributing flows with minimum 2 — single-flow correlation is rejected.
All cross-flow reads are read-only — mutation of source flow data is a BUILD_FAILURE.

keywords: cross flow correlation engine tenantId predicate every join minimum 2 source flows read-only CrossFlowCorrelationReported CF-FLOW13-AN-1
